mapper.sql: SELECT id, analysis_type, entity_key, city, content, satisfied, expired, created_at, updated_at FROM jw_ai_analysis
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_ai_analysis (analysis_type, entity_key, city, content, satisfied, expired, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{analysisType}, #{entityKey}, #{city}, #{content}, #{satisfied}, #{expired}, now(), now())
mapper.update: UPDATE jw_ai_analysis SET content = #{content}, city = #{city}, satisfied = NULL, expired = 0, updated_at = now() WHERE analysis_type = #{analysisType} AND entity_key = #{entityKey}
